objective: Implement 8 session-friction governance patches from 2026-05-01 PDCAR audit, plus Epic #638 Stage 6 closeout.
scope_boundary: Governance artifacts for this slice: plan, execution scope, handoff, closeout
out_of_scope: Broad standards rewrite beyond the 8 named patches
research_summary: 2026-05-01 PDCAR audit identified 8 friction points in Claude-as-primary sessions. Epic #638 slices A-D are merged; this slice E addresses residual friction patterns and adds the epic closeout.

sprints.name: PDCAR Slice E Friction Patches
sprints.goal: Apply all 8 session-friction patches and create epic #638 Stage 6 closeout.
tasks: Patch 1: Add Claude-as-primary dispatcher rule to STANDARDS.md §Society of Minds
Patch 2: Add worktree CWD discipline section to docs/EXTERNAL_SERVICES_RUNBOOK.md
Patch 3: Add SESSION_WORKTREE_ROOT warning path to hooks/schema-guard.sh
Patch 4: Add deleted_scope_files[] support to validate_handoff_package.py
Patch 5: Add approved_at threshold pre-flight to validate_structured_agent_cycle_plan.py
Patch 6: Add workflow_call input declaration check to CODEX.md
Patch 7: Create docs/session-error-patterns.md with 4 error patterns
Patch 8: Add CRITICAL anti-direct-implementation guardrail to CLAUDE.md
Create all required slice governance artifacts (plan, scope, handoff, closeout)
acceptance_criteria: AC1: STANDARDS.md contains Claude-as-Primary Dispatcher Rule section
AC2: EXTERNAL_SERVICES_RUNBOOK.md contains Worktree CWD Discipline section
AC3: schema-guard.sh contains SESSION_WORKTREE_ROOT warning path
AC4: validate_handoff_package.py skips existence check for files in deleted_scope_files[]
AC5: validate_structured_agent_cycle_plan.py emits pre-flight warning when approved_at >= threshold but required != true
AC6: CODEX.md documents workflow_call input declaration check requirement
AC7: docs/session-error-patterns.md exists with all 4 error patterns documented
AC8: CLAUDE.md Delegation Rules begins with CRITICAL anti-direct-implementation guardrail
AC9: Epic #638 Stage 6 closeout artifact exists at raw/closeouts/2026-05-01-epic-638-policy-hook-ci-hardening.md
AC10: All required slice governance artifacts present and valid

specialist_reviews.focus: Verify all 8 patches applied correctly and governance artifacts valid.
specialist_reviews.summary: All 8 patches applied via GitHub Contents API. Each patch verified by reading back the committed file.

alternate_model_review.summary: Cross-family path unavailable (Codex quota / LAM offline). Fallback: same-family claude-sonnet-4-6 with active exception. Exception expires 2026-05-02.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #648 Slice E: 8 PDCAR friction patches + Epic #638 Stage 6 closeout.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: AC1-AC10: All 8 patches applied, governance artifacts present, Epic #638 closeout filed

material_deviation_rules: Any edit outside the 8 named patch files and slice governance artifacts is a material deviation.
Any claim that this slice closes governance work beyond the 8 PDCAR friction patches is a material deviation.
